creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text:
I have the same problems with font rendering in ru_RU.UTF-8 locale. For myself, I found a solution and described it here https://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=399143#c27.

Problem with avatar due to OpenGL, I think. If you use the card and driver nvidia, then there is no problem. For my project ulbsd.ru, I rewrote the screen locker code without using OpenGL. And the avatar is displayed normally.
